The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] '''''Phoenix''''' at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] deployed the ''Phoenix'' to defend the [[Habeen]] research facility against retaliating [[Nharwaak]] dissidents at the height of the struggle to control the newly developed Habeen/[[Nharwaak]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology.

{{Ship-stub}}
